The Most Expensive Mistake in Motel Buying is the One You Don't See.

Professional operational due diligence for independent motel acquisitions. We find the hidden leaks in P&Ls, staff structures, and OTA setups before you sign.

Whether you are buying your first motel or adding to an existing portfolio, our audit gives you a practitioner-led view of the asset's true operational health before you commit capital.

Confidence Metrics

Properties audited 100+
Regional & metro coverage Specialists

What We Uncover in a Motel Acquisition Audit

01

Revenue Integrity

Validating the real occupancy versus reported figures, checking rate integrity, and stress-testing RevPAR assumptions against market reality.

02

Operational Leakage

Identifying wasted spend in staffing, laundry, and utilities, and mapping where daily practices are quietly eroding margin.

03

Digital Health

Auditing Google Business Profile, website conversion, and OTA commission structures so you understand how the property really attracts and converts demand.

04

Physical Liability

Highlighting maintenance debt, safety and WHS issues, and capital items that will require near-term investment after settlement.

Request a Motel Acquisition Audit

Provide a few details below and we'll schedule a confidential, practitioner-led review of your target property before you finalise your contract.

🔒 All inquiries are handled with 100% practitioner–client confidentiality.

Why Benjamin Douglas?

Practitioner-led due diligence for serious motel buyers.

Benjamin Douglas is the Lead Practitioner at Motel Coach and author of The Essential Guide to Motel Management. His background spans operational and commercial leadership across independent motel and hotel groups.

He has overseen operations across 16+ motels, 10 restaurants, and more than 200 staff, giving him a granular view of where motels leak profit and where they can scale.

This audit service is grounded in that experience. It is not a checkbox corporate report — it is a precise, practitioner-led review of the asset you are about to acquire.

Ready to Master Motel Operations?

Stop guessing and start yielding. Get the definitive 190+ page manual on Australian motel management, packed with hundreds of operational templates and checklists.

Buy the Book View Training Courses

Trusted by independent operators across Australia and New Zealand.

Motel Coach

Operational engineering for independent Australian motels. Moving owners from reactive management to systems-based profitability.
